allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial project scaffold

- Add project plan \(Sun-Seasons-Calendar-Project-Plan.md\) with resolved tech
  stack \(Python/FastAPI/Astral/Meeus/Nominatim\) and all design decisions
- Add pyproject.toml with uv/pip dependencies
- Add app/ skeleton: geocode, timezone, solar, seasons, ics_builder modules
- Add placeholder tests/, templates/, static/ directories
- Add .gitignore and README

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(.venvScriptspip install fastapi "uvicorn[standard]" astral timezonefinder geopy icalendar jinja2 pytest pytest-asyncio httpx ruff)
Bash(cmd /c ".venv\\Scripts\\pip install fastapi uvicorn[standard] astral timezonefinder geopy icalendar jinja2 pytest pytest-asyncio httpx ruff 2>&1")
